languages.text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} of 10%) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} of 10%) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

languages.text: Когда персонаж получает урон, равный или превышающий {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, эта броня выпускает волну энергии, нанося (от 25 до 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}силового урона{/g} (с {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} 10%) врагам в {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнем бою{/g}.\nБазовое свойство брони: +30 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силе{/g}.
languages.original_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Когда персонаж получает урон, равный или превышающий {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, эта броня выпускает волну энергии, нанося (от 25 до 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}силового урона{/g} (с {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} 10%) врагам в {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнем бою{/g}.\nБазовое свойство брони: +30 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силе{/g}.

Когда персонаж получает урон, равный или превышающий {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, эта броня выпускает волну энергии, нанося (от 25 до 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}силового урона{/g} (с {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} 10%) врагам в {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнем бою{/g}.\nБазовое свойство брони: +30 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силе{/g}.

languages.text: Lorsque l'utilisateur subit un nombre de points de dégâts supérieur ou égal à {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, cette armure déchaîne un souffle d'énergie qui inflige (entre 25 et 30) points de {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}dégâts énergétiques{/g} (avec 10 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}) aux ennemis à {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}portée de mêlée{/g}.\nPropriété d'armure de base : +30 à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g}.
languages.original_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque l'utilisateur subit un nombre de points de dégâts supérieur ou égal à {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, cette {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armure{/g} déchaîne un souffle d'énergie qui inflige (entre 25 et 30) points de {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}dégâts énergétiques{/g} (avec 10 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}) aux ennemis à {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}portée de mêlée{/g}.\nPropriété d'armure de base : +30 à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g}.

languages.text: Giyen kişi, {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8} kadar veya ondan daha yüksek hasara maruz kaldığında bu zırh, enerji patlaması meydana getirerek {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş menzili{/g} içindeki düşmanlara (25 ila 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}güç hasarı{/g} (%10 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahiptir) verir.\nTaban zırh özelliği: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g}.
languages.original_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Giyen kişi, {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8} kadar veya ondan daha yüksek hasara maruz kaldığında bu {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g}, enerji patlaması meydana getirerek {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş menzili{/g} içindeki düşmanlara (25 ila 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}güç hasarı{/g} (%10 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahiptir) verir.\nTaban zırh özelliği: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g}.

languages.text: 装备者受到大于或等于{uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}的伤害时，此护甲释放能量冲击，对{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}范围内敌人造成附带10%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的（25至30）点{g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}高能伤害{/g}。\n基础护甲特性：{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}+30。
languages.original_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 装备者受到大于或等于{uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}的伤害时，此{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}释放能量冲击，对{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战{/g}范围内敌人造成附带10%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的（25至30）点{g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}高能伤害{/g}。\n基础护甲特性：{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}+30。

languages.text: Cuando el portador sufre un daño igual o superior a {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, esta armadura desata un estallido de energía que inflige (de 25 a 30) de {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}daño por energía{/g} (con un 10 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}) a los enemigos que estén dentro del {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}alcance cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}.\nPropiedad básica de armadura: +30 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Fuerza{/g}.
languages.original_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cuando el portador sufre un daño igual o superior a {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, esta {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g} desata un estallido de energía que inflige (de 25 a 30) de {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}daño por energía{/g} (con un 10 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}) a los enemigos que estén dentro del {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}alcance cuerpo a cuerpo{/g}.\nPropiedad básica de armadura: +30 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Fuerza{/g}.

languages.text: Erleidet der Träger {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8} oder mehr Schaden, setzt diese Rüstung eine Energiewelle frei, die Gegnern in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfreichweite{/g} (25 bis 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}Energieschaden{/g} (mit 10 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}) zufügt.\nGrundeigenschaft Rüstungsdurchdringung: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Stärke{/g}.
languages.original_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Erleidet der Träger {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8} oder mehr Schaden, setzt diese {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} eine Energiewelle frei, die Gegnern in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfreichweite{/g} (25 bis 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}Energieschaden{/g} (mit 10 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}) zufügt.\nGrundeigenschaft Rüstungsdurchdringung: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Stärke{/g}.

languages.text: 装備者が{uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}以上のダメージを受けた時、この鎧はエネルギーの爆風を放ち、{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接範囲{/g}にいる敵に{g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}パワーダメージ{/g}を{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}10%の鎧貫通{/g}で与える。\n基本鎧性能: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力{/g}
languages.original_text: When the wearer suffers damage more than or equal to {uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}, this armour unleashes a blast of energy, dealing (from 25 to 30) {g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}power damage{/g} (with 10% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}) to enemies in {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee range{/g}.\nBase armour property: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 装備者が{uip|Wounds|f5809de6da7e407b95e15f8f7154a4d8}以上のダメージを受けた時、この鎧はエネルギーの爆風を放ち、{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接範囲{/g}にいる敵に{g|Encyclopedia:PowerDamage}パワーダメージ{/g}を{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}10%の鎧貫通{/g}で与える。\n基本鎧性能: +30 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力{/g}
